mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, f.create_time AS followTime FROM user_follow f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.follower_id = u.id WHERE f.following_id = ? ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, f.create_time AS followTime FROM user_follow f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.following_id = u.id WHERE f.follower_id = ? ORDER BY f.create_time DESC LIMIT ?, ?

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM user_follow f1 INNER JOIN user_follow f2 ON f1.follower_id = f2.following_id AND f1.following_id = f2.follower_id LEFT JOIN user u ON f1.following_id = u.id WHERE f1.follower_id = ? ORDER BY f1.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow f1 INNER JOIN user_follow f2 ON f1.follower_id = f2.following_id AND f1.following_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id = ?
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = ? AND follower_id = ?
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follow (following_id, follower_id, create_time) VALUES (?, ?, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = ? AND follower_id = ?
mapper.select: SELECT id, follower_id AS followerId, following_id AS followingId, create_time AS createTime FROM user_follow WHERE follower_id = ? ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, follower_id AS followerId, following_id AS followingId, create_time AS createTime FROM user_follow WHERE following_id = ? ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT f1.id, f1.follower_id AS followerId, f1.following_id AS followingId, f1.create_time AS createTime FROM user_follow f1 INNER JOIN user_follow f2 ON f1.follower_id = f2.following_id AND f1.following_id = f2.follower_id WHERE f1.follower_id = ? ORDER BY f1.create_time DESC
